---
title: "My sites"
---

## Primary sites

- Home: [djnavarro.net](https://djnavarro.net)
- Blog: [blog.djnavarro.net](https://blog.djnavarro.net)
- Art: [art.djnavarro.net](https://art.djnavarro.net)
- Code: [code.djnavarro.net](https://code.djnavarro.net)
- Papers: [papers.djnavarro.net](https://papers.djnavarro.net)

## Statistics, data science, etc 

- Data science slides: [slides.djnavarro.net](https://slides.djnavarro.net)
- Learning statistics with R: [learningstatisticswithr.com](https://learningstatisticswithr.com)
- Arrow workshop: [arrow-user2022.netlify.app](https://arrow-user2022.netlify.app)

## Academic teaching

- Minds and machines: [cogsci.djnavarro.net/minds-machines-4103](https://cogsci.djnavarro.net/minds-machines-4103)
- Computational cognitive science: [cogsci.djnavarro.net/compcogsci-3016](https://cogsci.djnavarro.net/compcogsci-3016)
- Perception and cognition: [cogsci.djnavarro.net/perception-cognition-2071](https://cogsci.djnavarro.net/perception-cognition-2071)
- Robust tools class: [cogsci.djnavarro.net/robust-tools](https://cogsci.djnavarro.net/robust-tools)
- Data visualisation: [cogsci.djnavarro.net/data-vis-2021](https://cogsci.djnavarro.net/data-vis-2021)
- Cognitive science: [cogsci.djnavarro.net/cognitive-science-3211](https://cogsci.djnavarro.net/cognitive-science-3211)
- Research methods workshops: [cogsci.djnavarro.net/methods-7000](https://cogsci.djnavarro.net/methods-7000)

## Miscellanea

- Art from code: [art-from-code.netlify.app](https://art-from-code.netlify.app)
- Neocities: [djnavarro.neocities.org](https://djnavarro.neocities.org/)
